description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 20 mins of coding time on WakaTime, averaging 2 hrs 24 mins per day. His activity was split across Java, Markdown, and other languages, with work spread over 5 projects. GitHub shows no commits, pull requests, or new repositories this week.
